title: Alpine skiing at the 2002 Winter Olympics
content: Alpine skiing at the 2002 Winter Olympics consisted of ten events held February 10–23 in the United States near Salt Lake City, Utah. The downhill, super-G, and combined events were held at Snowbasin, the giant slalom s at Park City, and the slalom s at adjacent Deer Valley. Medal table. Participating NOCs. Forty-nine nations competed in the alpine skiing events at Salt Lake City. Course information. Snowbasin hosted the downhill, super-G, and combined events; the giant slalom s were at Park City and the slalom s at adjacent Deer Valley <br
